title: 江戸っ子の泣きどころ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, what am I doin'? Can't believe I'd go and
forget my bag. All right, all good now...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's that?! ...Guess I imagined somethin'.
Geez, that gave me a scare, though!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...There's nothin' there, right? Hold up... even if it
was an evil spirit, there's no way the great Inari
would be scared!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Waaah?! What the heck?! Get lost, ya fiend!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, when I tell Inari One about the
stray cat that snuck into my office, she looks at
me with an unusually weary expression and nods.
